---
title: "Mechanism Design"
description: "VCG, auction formats, matching, voting — designing the rules of the game."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="kicker"><span data-topic-count="mechanism-design"></span> TUTORIALS</div>
  <h1>Mechanism Design</h1>
  <p class="lead">VCG, auction formats, matching, voting — designing the rules of the game.</p>
</div>
```
